summary: PWA implementation and smartphone sensor integration for iOS Safari stability.

achievements.details: Integrated DeviceMotion and Geolocation. Fixed iOS Safari permission issue by triggering sensor start from user gesture. Implemented Service Worker and Manifest.
Implemented 3-minute periodic sync and instant foreground sync using VisibilityChange API. Integrated automated final sync into walk completion flow.
Optimized statistics panel for mobile (2-column grid). Implemented collapsible walk history. Stabilized manual input using local reagent atoms.
Fixed auth-header format to comply with cljs-ajax map requirement. Unified data source to :current-walk for reliable syncing of manual and sensor data.

technical_debt_resolved: Resolved iOS-specific 'User Gesture' security constraint for sensor access.
Fixed manual input data loss on walk completion.
Corrected legacy auth header format error.
